blockr.ui: User Interface Components for the 'blockr' Ecosystem

Source: R/blockr.ui-package.R
blockr.ui-package.Rd

User-interface primitives shared across the 'blockr' ecosystem. Designed enhance 'blockr.dock'.

See also

Useful links:

  • https://bristolmyerssquibb.github.io/blockr.ui/

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/BristolMyersSquibb/blockr.ui/issues
